title: A BODY OF WISDOM - 211info
text: A BODY OF WISDOM A BODY OF WISDOM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides comprehensive medical care aimed at prevention and holistic treatment of acute and chronic conditions. Services include gynecological exams, well-child exams, general physical exams, nutrition and weight loss plans, testing and treatment for thyroid problems and allergies, diabetes support, cancer support, acupuncture treatment, and massage therapy. 119 NE 3rd Street Gresham, OR 97030 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: By appointment only Email (503) 665-9111 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 665-9111 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information and to schedule an appointment FEES: Low-income naturopathic visit $60; chiropractic and acupuncture sliding scale may apply. Speak with individual treatment provider regarding fees. OMAP open card for naturopathic services only. DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable AREA SERVED: Clackamas and Multnomah Counties Services: Alternative Medicine Nutrition Assessment Services Pap Tests Pediatrics Weight Management Well Baby Care If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
